title: epidendrum phtiarichilum
intro: Epidendrum phtiarichilum, also known as Puya chilensis or simply Puya, is a species of flowering plant in the family Bromeliaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of the plant are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat wounds. The herbal preparations of Epidendrum phtiarichilum typically involve the use of its leaves, which can be made into teas, infusions, or used topically in the form of ointments or salves.
